title: Maus's Chatty
description: Proximity-based chat & roleplay system for Minecraft. Features local/global chat modes, whispering, shouting, custom nicknames, dice rolls, and configurable distances. Perfect for immersive roleplay servers.
body:
# MaussChatty – All‑in‑One Server Utility & Roleplay Mod

**Forge 1.20.1** – English & Русский

MaussChatty brings together authentication, chat enhancements, homes, warps, professions, economy, punishment tools, and much more – all in one lightweight mod.

---
### WARNING! Many features were not tested, expect bugs, if found please contact me through discord ( just_dofykk )

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## ✨ Features

### 🔐 Authentication
- `/register`, `/login`, `/logout`, `/changepassword`
- Frozen movement until login (no cheating)

### 💬 Chat System
- **Local chat** with configurable radius (default 10 blocks)
- **Global chat** – toggle with `/g` and `/loc`, or use `!` prefix
- **Roleplay commands**: `/do`, `/me`, `/try`, `/it`, `/wh`, `/l`
- `/narrate` – send a message as another player (OP only)
- Custom nicknames: `/nick`, `/realname`, `/clearnick`
- `/roll` – d100 with win/lose/tie

### 👥 Player Interaction
- Private messages: `/msg` and `/r`
- Economy: `/pay` (balances stored in JSON)
- Warnings: `/warn`, `/warns`, `/clearwarns` – auto‑kick after 3
- Temporary mutes & bans: `/tempmute`, `/tempban` – formats like `30s`, `5m`, `2h`, `1d`
- Chat filter – block unwanted words, toggle with `/filter`

### 🏡 Homes & Warps
- Up to 3 homes per player (`/sethome`, `/home`, `/delhome`, `/homelist`)
- Global warps for admins (`/setwarp`, `/warp`, `/delwarp`, `/warplist`)

### 📦 Profession System
- Choose from Miner, Farmer, Warrior, Builder
- `/profession` – set or view your profession
- Admins can assign professions with `/profession set`

### 🛠️ Admin Tools
- `/invsee` – view and edit any player’s inventory
- `/enderchest` – view and edit ender chests
- `/bc` – broadcast messages
- `/weather`, `/time` – change world weather and time
- `/setjoinmessage` – custom join message (supports `%player%`)
- **Ban Stick** – a stick that bans the player you hit (OP only)

### 📌 Interactive Signs
- Write `[do] action` on a sign → right‑click to perform the action as `/do`

### 🎲 Random Chat Events (disabled by default)
- Fully configurable scheduled events (trivia, gift drops) – edit the JSON file

### 🏆 Achievements (placeholder – ready for expansion)

### 🌍 Localisation & API
- Full English and Russian translations
- Simple API for other mods to interact with MaussChatty

### 🔜 Roadmap
- Profession bonuses (speed, mining speed, damage)
- More random events and rewards
- Full achievement system with visual notifications
- Web panel & MySQL support

</details>



---


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## 📥 Installation

1. Install **Forge 1.20.1** on your server or client.
2. Download `MaussChatty-*.jar` and place it in the `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game – all data will be stored in `/mausschatty_data/` (JSON files).

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## ⚙️ Configuration

- Chat radii can be changed in `config/mausschatty-server.toml`.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## ❓ Support

- Discord: just_dofykk

</details>



---

**MaussChatty – Make your server smarter, fairer, and more fun!**
